raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Charged my Card {$35000.00} for No Service Provided. 
XXXX On XX/XX/year> I Disputed these fraudulent Charges with American Express XXXX Ref. No. XXXX. 
XXXX On XX/XX/year>, American Express Closed the Dispute with no resolution, apparently, American Express XXXX on False Invoices provided by XXXX XXXX XXXX, for a vehicle that they didn't perform any work on. 
XXXX American Express even refused to provide me with documents to determine the validity of the debt. 
XXXX XXXX and American Express took advantage of my XXXX XXXX, to run this scheme, and deprive me of my right to dispute fraudulent charges.
